_publications._publicationTitle: The Relationship Between Heart Rate Variability, Psychological Flexibility, and Pain in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: There were no significant associations between HF-HRV and...pain anxiety (r = −0.08, P = NS)...pain intensity was not correlated with...pain anxiety r = 0.05, P = NS
details: No significant association found between pain anxiety and HF-HRV (r = −0.08, P = NS) or pain intensity (r = 0.05, P = NS)
